strings.panel.p1.narration.1.html: Radd is a hero sprite, also known as a player character.
strings.panel.p2.narration.1.html: All of Radd's actions are controlled by the player, the person playing Kid Radd.
strings.panel.p3.narration.1.html: Radd cannot do anything on his own; his every move is commanded by the player.
strings.panel.p4.narration.1.html: In short, he's the player's little - -
